stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are true?

1. Anaemic hypoxia reduces the effectiveness of blood to transport oxygen
2. Hyperventilation can worsen oxygen absorption throughout the body
3. Hypoxic hypoxia is caused due to a decrease in the partial pressure of oxygen with altitude
4. Aircraft decompression reduces the partial pressure of oxygen, making oxygen transfer more difficult
5. Anaemic hypoxia is caused because the CO2 binds 200 times better with haemoglobin than O2
6. Hypoxic hypoxia is caused due to the reduction of oxygen percentage with altitude
7. Hypoxic hypoxia is caused due to an increase in the partial pressure of oxygen with altitude
